::: {.column-screen .pagebottom}
::: {.column-page .text-center .px-5 .py-5}
::: {.column width=40% .px-1}
[![](public/missing_icon.svg){width=6em}](https://ez-github-contributor.netlify.app/)  
Missing something in the Handbook?  
[Let us know!](https://ez-github-contributor.netlify.app/)
:::
::: {.column width=40% .px-1}
[![](public/question_icon.svg){width=6em}](./topics/rdm-support-desk.qmd)  
Question about your research data or research software?  
[Contact the RDM Support Desk](./topics/rdm-support-desk.qmd)
:::
:::
:::
